description: Lightweight static analysis for many languages. Find bug variants with patterns that look like source code.
license_name: GNU Lesser General Public License v2.1
commit_message:
Skip scanning of binary files by checking for file extension and magic bytes (semgrep/semgrep-proprietary#6449)

## Summary
We want to skip over scanning binary files like pngs and pdfs as these
can often take a long time and are not useful. This change identifies
binary files by first identifying the file type using
`File_type.file_type_of_file` function which checks for various file
extensions. It then checks the first 16 bytes of non-text files for
known [magic
bytes](https://en.wikipedia.org
